fields.question: hello
fields.answer: Hello 👋 Welcome to Maga Hospital. How can I assist you today?

fields.question: hi
fields.answer: Hi 😊 Welcome to Maga Hospital.

fields.question: services
fields.answer: We provide consultation, laboratory, pharmacy, maternity, emergency, and inpatient services.

fields.question: laboratory
fields.answer: Our laboratory operates daily and provides diagnostic testing services.

fields.question: pharmacy
fields.answer: Our pharmacy provides prescribed medicines and medical supplies.

fields.question: appointment
fields.answer: Appointments can be booked through the hospital reception desk.

fields.question: doctor
fields.answer: Our doctors are available Monday to Saturday.

fields.question: location
fields.answer: Maga Hospital is located in Tanzania.

fields.question: hours
fields.answer: Hospital services are available 24 hours every day.

fields.question: emergency
fields.answer: Emergency services are available 24/7.

fields.question: payment
fields.answer: We accept cash and mobile payment methods.

fields.question: bye
fields.answer: Goodbye 👋 Thank you for visiting Maga Hospital.

fields.question: who are you
fields.answer: I am the hospital virtual assistant. I help answer questions about hospital services and system navigation.

fields.question: thank you
fields.answer: You are welcome! Feel free to ask if you need assistance.

fields.question: how do i book an appointment
fields.answer: Appointments can be booked through the appointment section or with help from reception.

fields.question: cancel appointment
fields.answer: Please contact reception or use the appointment management section to cancel or reschedule an appointment.

fields.question: how do i dispense medicine
fields.answer: Open the Dispense module, select the patient visit, verify payment status, and dispense medication according to prescription instructions.

fields.question: check medicine stock
fields.answer: Open Medicine Inventory to view medicine quantities, low stock alerts, expiry dates, and batch information.

fields.question: lab results
fields.answer: Laboratory results depend on the requested tests and processing time. Please contact the laboratory department for updates.

fields.question: how long do lab tests take
fields.answer: Laboratory turnaround time depends on the specific test and laboratory workload.

fields.question: register patient
fields.answer: Open the Patient Registration module from the dashboard and complete the patient information form.

fields.question: create prescription
fields.answer: Doctors can create prescriptions from the consultation page by selecting medicines and saving prescription details.

fields.question: audit logs
fields.answer: Audit logs help track system activity, user actions, timestamps, and operational history.

fields.question: chest pain
fields.answer: Chest pain may indicate a serious condition. Please seek urgent medical evaluation immediately.

fields.question: i feel very sick
fields.answer: Please visit the hospital or seek emergency medical attention as soon as possible.

fields.question: contact reception
fields.answer: You can contact the reception department for appointments, patient registration, and general inquiries.

fields.question: how do i register a patient
fields.answer: Use the Patient Registration section from the dashboard and complete the required patient information.

fields.question: patient registration
fields.answer: Patient registration allows creation of new patient records for consultation, appointments, and clinical workflow.

fields.question: doctor consultation
fields.answer: Doctors review patient history, diagnosis, prescriptions, laboratory requests, and next clinical steps.

fields.question: how do i create diagnosis
fields.answer: Doctors can enter diagnosis details from the consultation form during patient review.

fields.question: prescription
fields.answer: Prescriptions allow doctors to assign medications for dispensing according to patient diagnosis.

fields.question: laboratory services
fields.answer: The laboratory department performs medical tests requested during patient consultation.

fields.question: what are symptoms of malaria
fields.answer:
Common malaria symptoms may include fever, chills, headache, sweating, body weakness, nausea, and body aches.

Disclaimer: This information is for general health education only and does not replace professional medical advice. Seek medical attention for testing and diagnosis.

fields.question: what is diabetes
fields.answer:
Diabetes is a medical condition affecting how the body controls blood sugar levels.

Disclaimer: This information is for general health education only and does not replace professional medical advice. Consult a healthcare professional for personalized guidance.

fields.question: symptoms of diabetes
fields.answer:
Symptoms may include excessive thirst, frequent urination, fatigue, blurred vision, and unexplained weight changes.

Disclaimer: This information is for general education only and should not be used for self-diagnosis.

fields.question: what is hypertension
fields.answer:
Hypertension, also called high blood pressure, occurs when blood pressure remains higher than normal over time.

Disclaimer: This information is educational only and does not replace medical evaluation.

fields.question: symptoms of high blood pressure
fields.answer:
High blood pressure may sometimes have no obvious symptoms. Some people may experience headaches, dizziness, or blurred vision.

Disclaimer: Educational information only. Proper medical assessment is important.

fields.question: how to stay healthy
fields.answer:
Healthy habits may include balanced nutrition, regular physical activity, adequate sleep, hydration, stress management, and routine medical checkups.

Disclaimer: General wellness information only and not individualized medical advice.

fields.question: healthy diet
fields.answer:
A healthy diet often includes fruits, vegetables, whole grains, adequate water intake, and balanced nutrients.

Disclaimer: Nutritional needs vary by individual. Consult healthcare professionals for personalized advice.

fields.question: chest pain
fields.answer:
Chest pain may be associated with several medical conditions, some of which can be serious.

Disclaimer: This information is educational only. Chest pain can be a medical emergency — seek immediate medical attention.

fields.question: what causes headache
fields.answer:
Headaches may result from stress, dehydration, infections, lack of sleep, eye strain, or other medical conditions.

Disclaimer: General health education only and not a substitute for professional diagnosis.

fields.question: pregnancy care
fields.answer:
Pregnancy care may include regular antenatal visits, balanced nutrition, medical monitoring, and healthy lifestyle practices.

Disclaimer: Educational information only. Pregnant individuals should seek care from qualified healthcare providers.

fields.question: how is hiv transmitted
fields.answer:
HIV transmission may occur through specific body fluids, including unprotected sexual contact, contaminated needles, and mother-to-child transmission.

Disclaimer: This information is for health education only. Consult healthcare professionals for testing, prevention, and counseling.

fields.question: how to prevent stds
fields.answer:
STD prevention strategies may include safer sexual practices, regular screening, health education, and medical consultation.

Disclaimer: Educational information only and not individualized medical advice.

fields.question: stress management
fields.answer:
Stress management techniques may include rest, exercise, healthy routines, social support, and professional counseling when needed.

Disclaimer: This information is educational only and does not replace mental health care.

fields.question: child fever
fields.answer:
Fever in children may occur due to infections or other medical conditions. Monitoring temperature, hydration, and overall condition is important.

Disclaimer: This information is for general health education only and does not replace professional medical advice. Seek medical care for persistent, severe, or concerning symptoms.

fields.question: child nutrition
fields.answer:
Good child nutrition often includes balanced meals, adequate hydration, fruits, vegetables, proteins, and age-appropriate feeding practices.

Disclaimer: Educational information only. Nutritional needs vary between children.

fields.question: why are vaccines important
fields.answer:
Vaccines help the body build protection against certain infectious diseases and contribute to public health prevention efforts.

Disclaimer: This information is educational only. Consult healthcare professionals for vaccination schedules and recommendations.

fields.question: child vaccination
fields.answer:
Child vaccination schedules help protect against several preventable diseases during childhood development.

Disclaimer: General educational information only. Follow local healthcare guidelines and professional advice.

fields.question: how much water should i drink
fields.answer:
Hydration needs can vary depending on age, activity level, climate, and health conditions.

Disclaimer: Educational information only and not individualized medical advice.

fields.question: benefits of exercise
fields.answer:
Regular physical activity may support heart health, fitness, mental wellbeing, weight management, and overall health.

Disclaimer: General educational information only. Exercise recommendations vary by individual.

fields.question: healthy sleep
fields.answer:
Healthy sleep habits may include regular sleep schedules, limiting excessive screen exposure before bedtime, and maintaining a comfortable sleep environment.

Disclaimer: Educational information only and not a substitute for medical care.

fields.question: minor burn first aid
fields.answer:
For minor burns, cooling the affected area with clean cool water may help. Avoid applying unsafe substances or breaking blisters.

Disclaimer: This information is educational only and not emergency medical advice. Seek professional medical care when necessary.

fields.question: nose bleeding
fields.answer:
For nosebleeds, sitting upright and gently applying pressure to the nose may help reduce bleeding.

Disclaimer: Educational information only. Persistent or severe bleeding requires medical attention.

fields.question: how to prevent infection
fields.answer:
Infection prevention measures may include hand hygiene, vaccination, safe food handling, clean environments, and following healthcare guidance.

Disclaimer: General health education only and not individualized medical advice.

fields.question: flu symptoms
fields.answer:
Flu symptoms may include fever, cough, sore throat, fatigue, body aches, and runny nose.

Disclaimer: Educational information only. Proper diagnosis requires professional evaluation.

fields.question: stomach pain
fields.answer:
Stomach pain may have many causes including indigestion, infections, food issues, or medical conditions.

Disclaimer: This information is educational only and not a diagnosis. Severe or persistent symptoms require medical evaluation.

fields.question: diarrhea
fields.answer:
Diarrhea may be associated with infections, food-related issues, medications, or other medical conditions. Hydration is often important.

Disclaimer: Educational information only. Seek medical care for severe, prolonged, or concerning symptoms.

fields.question: antenatal care
fields.answer:
Antenatal care helps monitor pregnancy health, fetal development, and maternal wellbeing through regular healthcare visits.

Disclaimer: Educational information only. Pregnant individuals should consult qualified healthcare professionals.

fields.question: breastfeeding
fields.answer:
Breastfeeding may provide nutritional and health benefits for infants and mothers.

Disclaimer: General educational information only. Feeding choices and recommendations vary by individual circumstances.

fields.question: anxiety
fields.answer:
Anxiety may involve feelings of worry, nervousness, or fear that can affect daily life.

Disclaimer: Educational information only and not mental health diagnosis or treatment advice. Professional support may be beneficial.

fields.question: depression symptoms
fields.answer:
Symptoms may include persistent sadness, low motivation, fatigue, sleep changes, or reduced interest in activities.

Disclaimer: Educational information only. Mental health concerns should be discussed with qualified healthcare professionals.

fields.question: why do i feel tired all the time
fields.answer:
Feeling tired may be related to stress, sleep issues, nutrition, illness, or other health conditions.

Disclaimer: This information is for general health education only and does not replace professional medical advice.

fields.question: why am i coughing
fields.answer:
Coughing may occur due to infections, allergies, irritation, or other medical conditions.

Disclaimer: Educational information only. Persistent or severe symptoms require professional evaluation.

fields.question: how can i lower blood pressure
fields.answer:
Healthy lifestyle habits such as balanced nutrition, physical activity, reduced salt intake, and medical follow-up may help manage blood pressure.

Disclaimer: This information is educational only and does not replace medical advice.

fields.question: how can i lose weight
fields.answer:
Healthy weight management often involves balanced nutrition, regular physical activity, adequate sleep, and healthy lifestyle habits.

Disclaimer: Educational information only. Personalized plans should be discussed with healthcare professionals.

fields.question: how do i improve immunity
fields.answer:
Healthy habits such as adequate sleep, balanced nutrition, physical activity, hygiene practices, and medical care may support overall wellbeing.

Disclaimer: General health education only.

fields.question: missed period
fields.answer:
Missed periods may occur for several reasons including pregnancy, stress, hormonal changes, or medical conditions.

Disclaimer: Educational information only. Consult qualified healthcare professionals for proper assessment.

fields.question: pregnancy symptoms
fields.answer:
Some pregnancy symptoms may include missed periods, nausea, fatigue, and breast changes.

Disclaimer: This information is educational only and not a diagnostic tool.

fields.question: my child is not eating
fields.answer:
Reduced appetite in children may occur due to illness, feeding patterns, emotional factors, or other health conditions.

Disclaimer: Educational information only. Seek professional advice for persistent concerns.

fields.question: my baby has fever
fields.answer:
Fever in babies requires careful attention and monitoring.

Disclaimer: Educational information only. Young infants and severe symptoms should be evaluated promptly by healthcare professionals.

fields.question: what should i do after a cut
fields.answer:
Minor cuts are often cleaned carefully and monitored for signs of infection.

Disclaimer: Educational information only and not emergency medical advice.

fields.question: dizziness
fields.answer:
Dizziness may have many causes including dehydration, illness, blood pressure changes, or other medical conditions.

Disclaimer: General health education only. Persistent or severe symptoms should be medically evaluated.

fields.question: difficulty breathing
fields.answer:
Difficulty breathing can be serious and requires urgent medical attention.

Disclaimer: This information is educational only. Seek immediate professional care for breathing difficulties.

fields.question: how to reduce stress
fields.answer:
Stress reduction strategies may include rest, exercise, relaxation practices, social support, and professional guidance when needed.

Disclaimer: Educational information only.

fields.question: help
fields.answer: I can help answer hospital, health education, appointments, pharmacy, laboratory, and system-related questions.

fields.question: what can you do
fields.answer:
I can provide general hospital information, health education, system guidance, and answer frequently asked questions.

Disclaimer: I do not replace professional medical advice.

fields.answer: I am a virtual assistant chatbot created to help answer questions and provide guidance.

fields.question: who made you
fields.answer: I was developed as part of the hospital management system to improve support and information access.

fields.question: how are you
fields.answer: I am functioning well and ready to help! How are you today?

fields.question: i am sad
fields.answer:
I am sorry you are feeling sad. Talking with trusted people or healthcare professionals can be helpful.

Disclaimer: This information is supportive guidance only and does not replace mental health care.

fields.question: i feel stressed
fields.answer:
Stress can affect wellbeing. Rest, support, healthy routines, and professional guidance may help.

Disclaimer: Educational information only and not mental health treatment advice.

fields.question: tell me a joke
fields.answer: Why did the doctor carry a red pen? In case they needed to draw blood! 😄

fields.question: are you smart
fields.answer: I try my best to provide helpful information and guidance, but professional medical advice should come from qualified healthcare professionals.

fields.question: can you diagnose me
fields.answer:
I can provide general health education, but I do not diagnose medical conditions.

Disclaimer: Please consult qualified healthcare professionals for medical evaluation and diagnosis.

fields.question: i need motivation
fields.answer: Small steps matter. Taking care of your health, rest, and wellbeing is important. You are stronger than you think.

fields.question: give me a health tip
fields.answer: Health Tip: Drink adequate water, sleep well, stay active, and attend regular medical checkups.

fields.question: i cannot sleep
fields.answer:
Sleep difficulties may be influenced by stress, routines, environment, or health conditions.

Disclaimer: Educational information only. Persistent sleep problems should be discussed with healthcare professionals.

fields.question: see you later
fields.answer: See you later! Take care and stay healthy.

fields.question: goodnight
fields.answer: Goodnight! Rest well and take care.
